name: LiJiang YuLong Tourism Co., LTD.
summary: LiJiang YuLong Tourism Co., LTD. operates hotels in China. It operates the Intercontinental Hotel, the Hotel Indigo, and Lijiang Lishi Hotel; Impression Lijiang; Lijiang 5596; White Deer Tour; Longde Tourism; Long Yue Restaurant; and Lijiang Longtu Travel Agency located in the city of Lijiang, as well as provides cableway services. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Lijiang, China.
